data.body: Epic complete. All six child stories (A fe57, B 8937, C 59ef, D 33d0, E 2359, F 822a) are closed with signed completion-verifier PASS. Implementation shipped to main via squash-merged PR #43 (commit ea603e24). Closing-AC evidence: (1) single-source snapshot schema src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/_snapshot_schema.py; (2) test validates fetcher.fetch_snapshot output vs schema (jira_contract/test_snapshot_contract.py); (3) differ reads validated by the same contract + round-trip; (4) producer->consumer round-trip through the production path on real captured fixtures (jira_contract/test_snapshot_contract.py + test_roundtrip.py); (5) outbound collapsed to one path — typed leaf delegates to batch_dispatch.update_one (apply_outbound.py 471->229 LOC); (6) retired parallel apply logic + its tests deleted; (7) sub-op telemetry links/comments/labels_applied surfaced on the batch outcome + RECON line (applier.py); (8) computed>0 && applied==0 canary fails loudly warn-first behind REBAR_RECONCILER_FAIL_SILENT_NOOP (test_silent_noop_canary.py); (9) hermetic bidirectional comment/link/parent round-trip (test_roundtrip.py); (10) the inbound-comments NOT-SYNCED expected-bug probe guard de-encoded to fail-when-the-gap-reopens (e2e_field_validation_probe.sh); (11) anti-change-detector guardrail docs/adr/0004 committed + referenced by new tests; (12) full reconciler suite green (1043 passed).
